Name.jp: シャドウビースト・ブレード

description.en: Attacks an enemy and gains a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分に<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>. Ignores the target's Resilience.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다. 대상의 효과 저항을 무시합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。この効果は対象の効果抵抗を無視する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。无视目标的效果抵抗。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGrants increased <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle. Also, <color=#28d9ed>steals</color> the target's <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> when attacking.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>이 증가합니다. 또한 공격 시 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>강탈</color>합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPする。攻撃時、対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>奪う</color>。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。并且攻击时,<color=#28d9ed>夺取</color>目标的<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

name.jp: イプシロンの身体強化I

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> by <color=#28d9ed>2%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> respectively, when gaining a turn. (Max 10 stacks)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 획득 시, <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률, 치명 피해</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>2%, 3% </color> 증가합니다.(최대 10회 누적)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>ずつUPする。\nこの効果は最大10回まで累積する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n获得回合时,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率、暴击伤害</color>分别提升<color=#28d9ed>2%、3%</color>。(最多可叠加10次)
